TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Fifian Tomas == Fifian Dioto Tomas (Inkiris: Vivien Theodore Thomas, 1910 miheca 8 folad 29 romi'ad - 1985 miheca 11 folad 26 romi'ad) o cecay a kicik no mitokaday Amilika tamdaw. I 1944 miheca, ci Tomas ato mitokaday ising ci Afelit Polayrok, faloco'an ising Haylon Taosik miadah to cecay Folosilien adada a wawa i, sarakatay pidemak ni Polaylok Tomas Taosik misaisalan a tokad . Malaheci ko pitokad mapalowid ko noisingan a manametay no faloco'an pitokad . Nawhani ci Tomas kohetingay tamdaw, o kaitira ningra caay ka patalahekal ko katadamaan i pitokadan a camil. Ikor oya misikeday miepecay to finacadan ko laloma'an no Amilika masereray to itiya saka, o katadamaabn ni Tomas mapahapinang to no i sekalan tamdaw . O katadamaan no demak ningra nai HBO i 2004 palaikaan to "Pafelian no kakarayan nga'ayay ising". Pafelian no kakarayan nga'ayay ising I 1930 mihecaan tadaecaay ko 'edes to ramaay finacadan a to'ek itiya, o cecay a kapah misa'icel a macedeng ko kafana' mapalowad no ising kakko a ising malamicokeray mitokad a kimad. -Nai Macedengay ising macedengay micokeray Fifian Tomas (Vivien Thomas) Matiya o nipatadoan no Kawas a mifana' to pisasayho a kicik ni Fifian, o todong parana'an no kamay no niyah. Saka fenek to kalaising a misa'icel ato tariktikay kamay matatama macalep ni Polayrok ising cingra. Sa'eten no mi'emetay to syakay o ahowidan no ising ko kanga'ayan i, nika oya nisa'icelan o kakangodoen no tamdamdaw ko pihamon ato pingodo. Caayay kalelen a demak mala kacalemceman to no faloco'. Samaanen oya tatiihay a pinangan a miasimanayay ko demak o saka piliyasaw ni Fifian to tayal. Talacowa halafin ko miheca matayal pa'aca to sapaiyo ira to ko sapadang no loma' i, nika mato mahoracay ko falaco' ni Fifian. Ira ko ngiha i faloco' ningra a malatihi ci Polayrok isingan mikingkiw to isingan to sapitikoaw.nanoya patiko haca cingra toya kaolahan katayalan, sakatadamaan toya kalacafay to ising a mikingkiw to isingan o kalipahakan no 'orip a hiratengen. Afelit Polayrok Alfred Blalock) (阿爾弗雷德·布萊洛克Alfred Blalock) O talifahalay ko kafana' to nisa'icel a macedengay ko kafana', talacowa tahiraay aca i kawcong ko nitilidan itiya, nika caay kikiharen ningra ko katadamaaqn ni Fifian. Malahakelong ko harateng no nilahacian a demak saka citadamaan a cingangan ni Fifian i isingan, misa'icel to saka cilikapo no tayal a kacilifon. Talacowa malita'angay ato kalaketeray pinangan a mapakadefit to ci Fifianan, nika o caayay ko misorikoray a tamdaw cingra, o pilepi no kohecalay tamdaw to roma tamdaw ko sapitena' no syakay i, saka makahiay aca cingra. I 'ayaw to pinapina mihecaan ko patiko ni Fifian o kahemakan to ningra, nawhani nai ci Fifianan mahapinang nengnengen ni Polayrok ising ko ka'enep to pikingkiw to isingan. Ira ko pakoniyahay a nisafaloco'an ato malecaday a kaolahan nangra, oya caayay ka falic to sapikingkiw to isingan ato pitokad to faloco' fenek nangra, tatiih kaciawaay nangra. Pinengnengan. Kasofocan: Fifian Tomas (Vivien Thomas) 1910 miheca 8 folad 29 romi'ad Amilika: New Iberia, Louisiana, Amilika Tayal: Mitokaday ising Katadamaan: Polayrok-Tomas-Taosik kasacilas a tokad Fifian Siaoto Tomas (Inkiris: Vivien Theodore Thomas, 1910 miheca 8 folad 29 romi'ad - 1985 miheca 11 folad 26 romi'ad) o cecay tadamaanay no Amilika micokeray mitokaday. 1944 miheca, ci Tomas aci Afelit Polayrok (Alfred Blalock) mitokaday ising, ci Helen Taussig faloco' ising mipa'orip to ciadadaay to titraloci falot (Tetralogy of Fallot) a wawa i, sarakat midemak to ni Polayrok-Tomas- Taussig (Blaylock Thomas Taussig) a misaisalan a tokad . Malaheci ko todong no itiyaay ho isingan to saki faloco' a manametay to faloco' a tokad . Nawhani o kohetingay tamdaw ci Tomas, orasaka o kaitira ningra i pitokadan a sofal halafin ko nika eca paso'elinan. Ikor i salaloma'an no Amilika o miepecay to finacadan lasawad sato itiya, ni Tomas a katadamaan ningra itiya to kafana'en to no 'alomanay . O kimad ningra itira i 2004 miheca mapalaika ko demak i HBO "Pafelian no kakarayan nga'ayay ising". Pinengnengan. (2003) Timmermans Stefan, "A Black Technician and Blue Babies" in Social Studies of Science 33:2 (April 2003), 197–229.
S.PHON: == fifian to~umas == fifian ɬ~ɮio~uto~u to~umas (inkiris: b~vib~viən tħəo~uɬ~ɮo~urə tħo~umas, **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ - **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ) o~u ʦəʦaj a kiʦik no~u mito~ukaɬ~ɮaj amiɾika tamɬ~ɮaw. i **** miħəʦa, ʦi to~umas ato~u mito~ukaɬ~ɮaj isiŋ ʦi afəɾit po~uɾajro~uk, faɾo~uʦo~uʡan isiŋ ħajɾo~un tao~usik miaɬ~ɮaħ to~u ʦəʦaj fo~uɾo~usiɾiən aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa a wawa i, sarakataj piɬ~ɮəmak ni po~uɾajɾo~uk to~umas tao~usik misaisaɾan a to~ukaɬ~ɮ . maɾaħəʦi ko~u pito~ukaɬ~ɮ mapaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ ko~u no~uisiŋan a manamətaj no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡan pito~ukaɬ~ɮ . nawħani ʦi to~umas ko~uħətiŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u kaitira niŋra ʦaaj ka pataɾaħəkaɾ ko~u kataɬ~ɮamaan i pito~ukaɬ~ɮan a ʦamiɾ. iko~ur o~uja misikəɬ~ɮaj miəpəʦaj to~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u amiɾika masərəraj to~u itija saka, o~u kataɬ~ɮamaab~b~vn ni to~umas mapaħapinaŋ to~u no~u i səkaɾan tamɬ~ɮaw . o~u kataɬ~ɮamaan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak niŋra nai ħb~b~vo~u i **** paɾaikaan to~u "pafəɾian no~u kakarajan ŋaʡajaj isiŋ". pafəɾian no~u kakarajan ŋaʡajaj isiŋ i **** miħəʦaan taɬ~ɮaəʦaaj ko~u ʡəɬ~ɮəs to~u ramaaj finaʦaɬ~ɮan a to~uʡək itija, o~u ʦəʦaj a kapaħ misaʡiʦəɾ a maʦəɬ~ɮəŋ ko~u kafanaʡ mapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ no~u isiŋ kakko~u a isiŋ maɾamiʦo~ukəraj mito~ukaɬ~ɮ a kimaɬ~ɮ. -nai maʦəɬ~ɮəŋaj isiŋ maʦəɬ~ɮəŋaj miʦo~ukəraj fifian to~umas (b~vib~viən tħo~umas) matija o~u nipataɬ~ɮo~uan no~u kawas a mifanaʡ to~u pisasajħo~u a kiʦik ni fifian, o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ paranaʡan no~u kamaj no~u nijaħ. saka fənək to~u kaɾaisiŋ a misaʡiʦəɾ ato~u tariktikaj kamaj matatama maʦaɾəp ni po~uɾajro~uk isiŋ ʦiŋra. saʡətən no~u miʡəmətaj to~u sjakaj o~u aħo~uwiɬ~ɮan no~u isiŋ ko~u kaŋaʡajan i, nika o~uja nisaʡiʦəɾan o~u kakaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uən no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw ko~u piħamo~un ato~u piŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u. ʦaajaj kaɾəɾən a ɬ~ɮəmak maɾa kaʦaɾəmʦəman to~u no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ. samaanən o~uja tatiiħaj a pinaŋan a miasimanajaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak o~u saka piɾijasaw ni fifian to~u tajaɾ. taɾaʦo~uwa ħaɾafin ko~u miħəʦa matajaɾ paʡaʦa to~u sapaijo~u ira to~u ko~u sapaɬ~ɮaŋ no~u ɾo~umaʡ i, nika mato~u maħo~uraʦaj ko~u faɾaʦo~uʡ ni fifian. ira ko~u ŋiħa i faɾo~uʦo~uʡ niŋra a maɾatiħi ʦi po~uɾajro~uk isiŋan mikiŋkiw to~u isiŋan to~u sapitiko~uaw.nano~uja patiko~u ħaʦa ʦiŋra to~uja kao~uɾaħan katajaɾan, sakataɬ~ɮamaan to~uja kaɾaʦafaj to~u isiŋ a mikiŋkiw to~u isiŋan o~u kaɾipaħakan no~u ʡo~urip a ħiratəŋən. afəɾit po~uɾajro~uk aɾfrəɬ~ɮ b~b~vɾaɾo~uʦk) (**********aɾfrəɬ~ɮ b~b~vɾaɾo~uʦk) o~u taɾifaħaɾaj ko~u kafanaʡ to~u nisaʡiʦəɾ a maʦəɬ~ɮəŋaj ko~u kafanaʡ, taɾaʦo~uwa taħiraaj aʦa i kawʦo~uŋ ko~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan itija, nika ʦaaj kikiħarən niŋra ko~u kataɬ~ɮamaa*n ni fifian. maɾaħakəɾo~uŋ ko~u ħaratəŋ no~u niɾaħaʦian a ɬ~ɮəmak saka ʦitaɬ~ɮamaan a ʦiŋaŋan ni fifian i isiŋan, misaʡiʦəɾ to~u saka ʦiɾikapo~u no~u tajaɾ a kaʦiɾifo~un. taɾaʦo~uwa maɾitaʡaŋaj ato~u kaɾakətəraj pinaŋan a mapakaɬ~ɮəfit to~u ʦi fifianan, nika o~u ʦaajaj ko~u miso~uriko~uraj a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋra, o~u piɾəpi no~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u sapitənaʡ no~u sjakaj i, saka makaħiaj aʦa ʦiŋra. i ʡajaw to~u pinapina miħəʦaan ko~u patiko~u ni fifian o~u kaħəmakan to~u niŋra, nawħani nai ʦi fifianan maħapinaŋ nəŋnəŋən ni po~uɾajro~uk isiŋ ko~u kaʡənəp to~u pikiŋkiw to~u isiŋan. ira ko~u pako~unijaħaj a nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan ato~u maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj a kao~uɾaħan naŋra, o~uja ʦaajaj ka faɾiʦ to~u sapikiŋkiw to~u isiŋan ato~u pito~ukaɬ~ɮ to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ fənək naŋra, tatiiħ kaʦiawaaj naŋra. pinəŋnəŋan. kaso~ufo~uʦan: fifian to~umas (b~vib~viən tħo~umas) **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ amiɾika: nəw ib~b~vəria, ɾo~uo~u~uisiana, amiɾika tajaɾ: mito~ukaɬ~ɮaj isiŋ kataɬ~ɮamaan: po~uɾajro~uk-to~umas-tao~usik kasaʦiɾas a to~ukaɬ~ɮ fifian siao~uto~u to~umas (inkiris: b~vib~viən tħəo~uɬ~ɮo~urə tħo~umas, **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ - **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ) o~u ʦəʦaj taɬ~ɮamaanaj no~u amiɾika miʦo~ukəraj mito~ukaɬ~ɮaj. **** miħəʦa, ʦi to~umas aʦi afəɾit po~uɾajro~uk (aɾfrəɬ~ɮ b~b~vɾaɾo~uʦk) mito~ukaɬ~ɮaj isiŋ, ʦi ħəɾən tao~u~ussi* faɾo~uʦo~uʡ isiŋ mipaʡo~urip to~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~u titraɾo~uʦi faɾo~ut (tətraɾo~u*j o~uf faɾɾo~ut) a wawa i, sarakat miɬ~ɮəmak to~u ni po~uɾajro~uk-to~umas- tao~u~ussi* (b~b~vɾajɾo~uʦk tħo~umas tao~u~ussi*) a misaisaɾan a to~ukaɬ~ɮ . maɾaħəʦi ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u itijaaj ħo~u isiŋan to~u saki faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a manamətaj to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a to~ukaɬ~ɮ . nawħani o~u ko~uħətiŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi to~umas, o~urasaka o~u kaitira niŋra i pito~ukaɬ~ɮan a so~ufaɾ ħaɾafin ko~u nika əʦa paso~uʡəɾinan. iko~ur i saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u amiɾika o~u miəpəʦaj to~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ɾasawaɬ~ɮ sato~u itija, ni to~umas a kataɬ~ɮamaan niŋra itija to~u kafanaʡən to~u no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj . o~u kimaɬ~ɮ niŋra itira i **** miħəʦa mapaɾaika ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak i ħb~b~vo~u "pafəɾian no~u kakarajan ŋaʡajaj isiŋ". pinəŋnəŋan. (****) timmərmans stəfan, "a b~b~vɾaʦk təʦħniʦian anɬ~ɮ b~b~vɾo~u~uə b~b~vab~b~viəs" in so~uʦiaɾ sto~u~uɬ~ɮiəs o~uf sʦiənʦə **:* (apriɾ ****), *******.
S.FORM: == Fifian Tomas == Fifian Dioto Tomas (Inkiris: Vivien Theodore Thomas, 1910 miheca 8 folad 29 romi'ad - 1985 miheca 11 folad 26 romi'ad) o cecay a kicik no mitokaday Amilika tamdaw. I 1944 miheca, ci Tomas ato mitokaday ising ci Afelit Polayrok, faloco'an ising Haylon Taosik miadah to cecay Folosilien adada a wawa i, sarakatay pidemak ni Polaylok Tomas Taosik misaisalan a tokad . Malaheci ko pitokad mapalowid ko noisingan a manametay no faloco'an pitokad . Nawhani ci Tomas kohetingay tamdaw, o kaitira ningra caay ka patalahekal ko katadamaan i pitokadan a camil. Ikor oya misikeday miepecay to finacadan ko laloma'an no Amilika masereray to itiya saka, o katadamaabn ni Tomas mapahapinang to no i sekalan tamdaw . O katadamaan no demak ningra nai HBO i 2004 palaikaan to "Pafelian no kakarayan nga'ayay ising". Pafelian no kakarayan nga'ayay ising I 1930 mihecaan tadaecaay ko 'edes to ramaay finacadan a to'ek itiya, o cecay a kapah misa'icel a macedeng ko kafana' mapalowad no ising kakko a ising malamicokeray mitokad a kimad. -Nai Macedengay ising macedengay micokeray Fifian Tomas (Vivien Thomas) Matiya o nipatadoan no Kawas a mifana' to pisasayho a kicik ni Fifian, o todong parana'an no kamay no niyah. Saka fenek to kalaising a misa'icel ato tariktikay kamay matatama macalep ni Polayrok ising cingra. Sa'eten no mi'emetay to syakay o ahowidan no ising ko kanga'ayan i, nika oya nisa'icelan o kakangodoen no tamdamdaw ko pihamon ato pingodo. Caayay kalelen a demak mala kacalemceman to no faloco'. Samaanen oya tatiihay a pinangan a miasimanayay ko demak o saka piliyasaw ni Fifian to tayal. Talacowa halafin ko miheca matayal pa'aca to sapaiyo ira to ko sapadang no loma' i, nika mato mahoracay ko falaco' ni Fifian. Ira ko ngiha i faloco' ningra a malatihi ci Polayrok isingan mikingkiw to isingan to sapitikoaw.nanoya patiko haca cingra toya kaolahan katayalan, sakatadamaan toya kalacafay to ising a mikingkiw to isingan o kalipahakan no 'orip a hiratengen. Afelit Polayrok Alfred Blalock) (阿爾弗雷德·布萊洛克Alfred Blalock) O talifahalay ko kafana' to nisa'icel a macedengay ko kafana', talacowa tahiraay aca i kawcong ko nitilidan itiya, nika caay kikiharen ningra ko katadamaaqn ni Fifian. Malahakelong ko harateng no nilahacian a demak saka citadamaan a cingangan ni Fifian i isingan, misa'icel to saka cilikapo no tayal a kacilifon. Talacowa malita'angay ato kalaketeray pinangan a mapakadefit to ci Fifianan, nika o caayay ko misorikoray a tamdaw cingra, o pilepi no kohecalay tamdaw to roma tamdaw ko sapitena' no syakay i, saka makahiay aca cingra. I 'ayaw to pinapina mihecaan ko patiko ni Fifian o kahemakan to ningra, nawhani nai ci Fifianan mahapinang nengnengen ni Polayrok ising ko ka'enep to pikingkiw to isingan. Ira ko pakoniyahay a nisafaloco'an ato malecaday a kaolahan nangra, oya caayay ka falic to sapikingkiw to isingan ato pitokad to faloco' fenek nangra, tatiih kaciawaay nangra. Pinengnengan. Kasofocan: Fifian Tomas (Vivien Thomas) 1910 miheca 8 folad 29 romi'ad Amilika: New Iberia, Louisiana, Amilika Tayal: Mitokaday ising Katadamaan: Polayrok-Tomas-Taosik kasacilas a tokad Fifian Siaoto Tomas (Inkiris: Vivien Theodore Thomas, 1910 miheca 8 folad 29 romi'ad - 1985 miheca 11 folad 26 romi'ad) o cecay tadamaanay no Amilika micokeray mitokaday. 1944 miheca, ci Tomas aci Afelit Polayrok (Alfred Blalock) mitokaday ising, ci Helen Taussig faloco' ising mipa'orip to ciadadaay to titraloci falot (Tetralogy of Fallot) a wawa i, sarakat midemak to ni Polayrok-Tomas- Taussig (Blaylock Thomas Taussig) a misaisalan a tokad . Malaheci ko todong no itiyaay ho isingan to saki faloco' a manametay to faloco' a tokad . Nawhani o kohetingay tamdaw ci Tomas, orasaka o kaitira ningra i pitokadan a sofal halafin ko nika eca paso'elinan. Ikor i salaloma'an no Amilika o miepecay to finacadan lasawad sato itiya, ni Tomas a katadamaan ningra itiya to kafana'en to no 'alomanay . O kimad ningra itira i 2004 miheca mapalaika ko demak i HBO "Pafelian no kakarayan nga'ayay ising". Pinengnengan. (2003) Timmermans Stefan, "A Black Technician and Blue Babies" in Social Studies of Science 33:2 (April 2003), 197–229.
S.PHON: == fifian to~umas == fifian ɬ~ɮio~uto~u to~umas (inkiris: b~vib~viən tħəo~uɬ~ɮo~urə tħo~umas, **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ - **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ) o~u ʦəʦaj a kiʦik no~u mito~ukaɬ~ɮaj amiɾika tamɬ~ɮaw. i **** miħəʦa, ʦi to~umas ato~u mito~ukaɬ~ɮaj isiŋ ʦi afəɾit po~uɾajro~uk, faɾo~uʦo~uʡan isiŋ ħajɾo~un tao~usik miaɬ~ɮaħ to~u ʦəʦaj fo~uɾo~usiɾiən aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa a wawa i, sarakataj piɬ~ɮəmak ni po~uɾajɾo~uk to~umas tao~usik misaisaɾan a to~ukaɬ~ɮ . maɾaħəʦi ko~u pito~ukaɬ~ɮ mapaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ ko~u no~uisiŋan a manamətaj no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡan pito~ukaɬ~ɮ . nawħani ʦi to~umas ko~uħətiŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u kaitira niŋra ʦaaj ka pataɾaħəkaɾ ko~u kataɬ~ɮamaan i pito~ukaɬ~ɮan a ʦamiɾ. iko~ur o~uja misikəɬ~ɮaj miəpəʦaj to~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u amiɾika masərəraj to~u itija saka, o~u kataɬ~ɮamaab~b~vn ni to~umas mapaħapinaŋ to~u no~u i səkaɾan tamɬ~ɮaw . o~u kataɬ~ɮamaan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak niŋra nai ħb~b~vo~u i **** paɾaikaan to~u "pafəɾian no~u kakarajan ŋaʡajaj isiŋ". pafəɾian no~u kakarajan ŋaʡajaj isiŋ i **** miħəʦaan taɬ~ɮaəʦaaj ko~u ʡəɬ~ɮəs to~u ramaaj finaʦaɬ~ɮan a to~uʡək itija, o~u ʦəʦaj a kapaħ misaʡiʦəɾ a maʦəɬ~ɮəŋ ko~u kafanaʡ mapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ no~u isiŋ kakko~u a isiŋ maɾamiʦo~ukəraj mito~ukaɬ~ɮ a kimaɬ~ɮ. -nai maʦəɬ~ɮəŋaj isiŋ maʦəɬ~ɮəŋaj miʦo~ukəraj fifian to~umas (b~vib~viən tħo~umas) matija o~u nipataɬ~ɮo~uan no~u kawas a mifanaʡ to~u pisasajħo~u a kiʦik ni fifian, o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ paranaʡan no~u kamaj no~u nijaħ. saka fənək to~u kaɾaisiŋ a misaʡiʦəɾ ato~u tariktikaj kamaj matatama maʦaɾəp ni po~uɾajro~uk isiŋ ʦiŋra. saʡətən no~u miʡəmətaj to~u sjakaj o~u aħo~uwiɬ~ɮan no~u isiŋ ko~u kaŋaʡajan i, nika o~uja nisaʡiʦəɾan o~u kakaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uən no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw ko~u piħamo~un ato~u piŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u. ʦaajaj kaɾəɾən a ɬ~ɮəmak maɾa kaʦaɾəmʦəman to~u no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ. samaanən o~uja tatiiħaj a pinaŋan a miasimanajaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak o~u saka piɾijasaw ni fifian to~u tajaɾ. taɾaʦo~uwa ħaɾafin ko~u miħəʦa matajaɾ paʡaʦa to~u sapaijo~u ira to~u ko~u sapaɬ~ɮaŋ no~u ɾo~umaʡ i, nika mato~u maħo~uraʦaj ko~u faɾaʦo~uʡ ni fifian. ira ko~u ŋiħa i faɾo~uʦo~uʡ niŋra a maɾatiħi ʦi po~uɾajro~uk isiŋan mikiŋkiw to~u isiŋan to~u sapitiko~uaw.nano~uja patiko~u ħaʦa ʦiŋra to~uja kao~uɾaħan katajaɾan, sakataɬ~ɮamaan to~uja kaɾaʦafaj to~u isiŋ a mikiŋkiw to~u isiŋan o~u kaɾipaħakan no~u ʡo~urip a ħiratəŋən. afəɾit po~uɾajro~uk aɾfrəɬ~ɮ b~b~vɾaɾo~uʦk) (**********aɾfrəɬ~ɮ b~b~vɾaɾo~uʦk) o~u taɾifaħaɾaj ko~u kafanaʡ to~u nisaʡiʦəɾ a maʦəɬ~ɮəŋaj ko~u kafanaʡ, taɾaʦo~uwa taħiraaj aʦa i kawʦo~uŋ ko~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan itija, nika ʦaaj kikiħarən niŋra ko~u kataɬ~ɮamaa*n ni fifian. maɾaħakəɾo~uŋ ko~u ħaratəŋ no~u niɾaħaʦian a ɬ~ɮəmak saka ʦitaɬ~ɮamaan a ʦiŋaŋan ni fifian i isiŋan, misaʡiʦəɾ to~u saka ʦiɾikapo~u no~u tajaɾ a kaʦiɾifo~un. taɾaʦo~uwa maɾitaʡaŋaj ato~u kaɾakətəraj pinaŋan a mapakaɬ~ɮəfit to~u ʦi fifianan, nika o~u ʦaajaj ko~u miso~uriko~uraj a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋra, o~u piɾəpi no~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u sapitənaʡ no~u sjakaj i, saka makaħiaj aʦa ʦiŋra. i ʡajaw to~u pinapina miħəʦaan ko~u patiko~u ni fifian o~u kaħəmakan to~u niŋra, nawħani nai ʦi fifianan maħapinaŋ nəŋnəŋən ni po~uɾajro~uk isiŋ ko~u kaʡənəp to~u pikiŋkiw to~u isiŋan. ira ko~u pako~unijaħaj a nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan ato~u maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj a kao~uɾaħan naŋra, o~uja ʦaajaj ka faɾiʦ to~u sapikiŋkiw to~u isiŋan ato~u pito~ukaɬ~ɮ to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ fənək naŋra, tatiiħ kaʦiawaaj naŋra. pinəŋnəŋan. kaso~ufo~uʦan: fifian to~umas (b~vib~viən tħo~umas) **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ amiɾika: nəw ib~b~vəria, ɾo~uo~u~uisiana, amiɾika tajaɾ: mito~ukaɬ~ɮaj isiŋ kataɬ~ɮamaan: po~uɾajro~uk-to~umas-tao~usik kasaʦiɾas a to~ukaɬ~ɮ fifian siao~uto~u to~umas (inkiris: b~vib~viən tħəo~uɬ~ɮo~urə tħo~umas, **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ - **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ) o~u ʦəʦaj taɬ~ɮamaanaj no~u amiɾika miʦo~ukəraj mito~ukaɬ~ɮaj. **** miħəʦa, ʦi to~umas aʦi afəɾit po~uɾajro~uk (aɾfrəɬ~ɮ b~b~vɾaɾo~uʦk) mito~ukaɬ~ɮaj isiŋ, ʦi ħəɾən tao~u~ussi* faɾo~uʦo~uʡ isiŋ mipaʡo~urip to~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~u titraɾo~uʦi faɾo~ut (tətraɾo~u*j o~uf faɾɾo~ut) a wawa i, sarakat miɬ~ɮəmak to~u ni po~uɾajro~uk-to~umas- tao~u~ussi* (b~b~vɾajɾo~uʦk tħo~umas tao~u~ussi*) a misaisaɾan a to~ukaɬ~ɮ . maɾaħəʦi ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u itijaaj ħo~u isiŋan to~u saki faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a manamətaj to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a to~ukaɬ~ɮ . nawħani o~u ko~uħətiŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi to~umas, o~urasaka o~u kaitira niŋra i pito~ukaɬ~ɮan a so~ufaɾ ħaɾafin ko~u nika əʦa paso~uʡəɾinan. iko~ur i saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u amiɾika o~u miəpəʦaj to~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ɾasawaɬ~ɮ sato~u itija, ni to~umas a kataɬ~ɮamaan niŋra itija to~u kafanaʡən to~u no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj . o~u kimaɬ~ɮ niŋra itira i **** miħəʦa mapaɾaika ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak i ħb~b~vo~u "pafəɾian no~u kakarajan ŋaʡajaj isiŋ". pinəŋnəŋan. (****) timmərmans stəfan, "a b~b~vɾaʦk təʦħniʦian anɬ~ɮ b~b~vɾo~u~uə b~b~vab~b~viəs" in so~uʦiaɾ sto~u~uɬ~ɮiəs o~uf sʦiənʦə **:* (apriɾ ****), *******.
